name: Crabs Carribbean-Style
recipeIngredient: 1 Hot green chili, finely-chopped and seeded
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a skillet.
2. Add scallions, garlic, and chili peppers; cook until scallions are wilted.
3. Stir in curry powder and mix thoroughly.
4. Add crab meat, coriander, parsley, salt, pepper, and crab liquid (add melted butter if needed).
5. Mix in bread crumbs.
6. Fill clam shells with the mixture.
7. Bake at 400°F for about 10 minutes or until browned.
Serves 8 as an appetizer or 3 to 4 as a main course.
